title: React Native Agent Skills
oneLiner: React Native-focused skills for helping coding agents work on mobile app projects.
summary: React Native Agent Skills is a Callstack Incubator repository of agent-optimized skills for coding assistants working in React Native projects.
whyItMatters: React Native Agent Skills matters because mobile projects have conventions, build systems, testing flows, and upgrade traps that generic agents often miss. Domain-specific skills can make agents behave more like an experienced React Native developer.
bestFor: React Native teams using coding agents
Developers who want mobile-specific agent procedures
Tool builders studying domain-specific skill libraries
notFor: Users who want a fully managed consumer product with no setup work
Teams that cannot review the linked source, license, and operational requirements before adoption
seoTitle: React Native Agent Skills: Skills resource for open AI builders
seoDescription: React Native Agent Skills profile on OpenAgent.bot: what it is, when to use it, official links, open-source status, and structured resource data.
shareTitle: React Native Agent Skills on OpenAgent.bot
shareDescription: React Native-focused skills for helping coding agents work on mobile app projects.

coreStrengths.title: Domain-specific skills
coreStrengths.description: The repository focuses on React Native rather than generic coding advice.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: Specificity is what makes skills more valuable than broad prompts.

coreStrengths.title: Agent-optimized format
coreStrengths.description: Skills are written for AI coding assistants and agent workflows.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: The content is designed to guide agent behavior during real implementation tasks.

coreStrengths.title: Mobile workflow coverage
coreStrengths.description: React Native work often needs upgrade, device, build, and platform context.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: These are exactly the details generic LLMs tend to mishandle.

useCaseNotes.description: Help agents reason about simulator, device, and platform-specific issues.

useCaseNotes.description: Provide reusable instructions for how React Native projects should be changed safely.
